verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Saved, saved, saved to the uttermost: Saved, saved by power divine; Saved, saved, I'm saved to the uttermost: Jesus the Savior is mine!

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: Saved to the uttermost: this I can say, "Once all was darkness, but now it is day;" Beautiful visions of glory I see; Jesus in brightness revealed unto me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Saved to the uttermost: cheerfully sing Loud hallelujahs to Jesus my King! Ransomed and pardoned, redeemed by His blood, Cleansed from unrighteousness, glory to God!
